text:
ADL self-performance "-" = Unknown, 0 = Independent - No help provided, 1 = Supervision - Oversight help only, 2 = Physical help limited to transfer only, 3 = Physical help in part of bathing activity, 4 = Total Dependence, 8 = Activity did not occur during entire 7 days.
227 G2B G2B_BATH_SUPPORT (G2B) Bathing Support CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: bathing - ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person
